message:
fix(ufunc): return NaN for reduce_var when ddof >= axis_len

When ddof equals or exceeds the axis length, the divisor
(axis_len - ddof) saturates to zero, previously causing division by
zero and producing infinity. Now fill the variance output with NaN
instead, matching NumPy's behavior for np.var(..., ddof=N) when N
is too large.

Add tests for both reduce_var and reduce_std with ddof >= axis_len.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
